title: cynanchum palustre
intro: Cynanchum palustre, also known as Marsh Milkweed, is a perennial plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to Eastern Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum palustre include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
